history.content:
<thought>
I am currently facing right ('>') and standing next to a lava cell ('L') on my right side. Moving forward would lead me into lava, which is dangerous. The goal is located diagonally down-right in the map. To safely reach it, I need to turn downwards ('v') and then move forward into a safe cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing downwards ('v') and the cell in front is safe to move into (floor '.'). Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at the bottom right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing downwards ('v'). The cell in front of me is a floor cell ('.') and safe to move forward. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at the bottom right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing downwards ('v'). The cell in front of me is the goal cell ('G'), but there is also lava ('L') to the left of the goal. Moving forward will bring me to the goal cell safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing downwards ('v'). The goal 'G' is right in front of me, so moving forward will take me to the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down ('v'), but there is a wall below me, so I cannot move forward. The goal 'G' is to my right. To move towards the goal, I should turn right to face the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Now I am facing left ('<'), but the goal 'G' is to my right. I need to turn around or turn right twice to face right and move towards the goal. I will turn right twice. First, I will make one TURN_RIGHT to face up.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Currently facing up ('^'), but the goal is to my right. I need to face right ('>') to move towards the goal. I will turn right once.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right ('>'). The goal 'G' is the cell immediately to the right. I will move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
